plugins.description: End-to-end specâ†’APPROVE orchestrator. Composes multi-agent-developer (build) with multi-agent-review (review-fix loop). Lather, rinse, repeat â€” for code.

plugins.description: Long-running multi-phase build orchestrator: baton-runner queues specs as implementâ†’reviewâ†’fix units, baton-runner-multi-agent uses multi-agent dev teams per phase, baton-pass writes session handoff notes.

plugins.description: User-invoked /scratchpad capture: append items (or check them off) on a configured GitHub checkbox issue. Smart section placement, dup-detection, never closes the issue.
